input.initialPrompt: Build this project using PowerShell and create a binlog for diagnostic purposes.

data.reasoningText: The user wants to build the .NET project using PowerShell and create a binary log (binlog) for diagnostic purposes. Let me first look at the project files to understand the structure, then build with the appropriate command.

kind.description: Build project with PowerShell and generate binlog

data.content:
Build succeeded. The binlog file has been generated at `build.binlog` in the project directory.

```
SimpleApp -> bin/Debug/net8.0/SimpleApp.dll
0 Warning(s), 0 Error(s)
Time Elapsed: 00:00:24.03
```

The `build.binlog` file can be analyzed with tools like the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/) or replayed via `dotnet msbuild build.binlog` for diagnostics.
